pitchEn: A price watcher that tracks selected crypto (BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, DOGE) and currency rates and sends a local notification the moment a price crosses a threshold you set. It only reads prices from free public sources and never handles payments or wallets.
newFeaturesEn: First release: set high/low price thresholds on crypto and currency rates and get on-device local alerts, with checks every 15 minutes, hourly or daily.

dataHandling.notes: Reads read-only public price data from public exchange APIs. No wallet, no trading, no payments, no personal data. Watch list, thresholds and logs are stored locally; local notifications only.

reviewerRemarksEn: No account or login is required. On first launch choose a language and activate the robot, then grant notifications and add a watch by picking a crypto or currency, a threshold and a direction. Internet is only used to read public exchange rates. Use 'Check now' to test; when a threshold is crossed a local notification is shown. The app only monitors prices; it does not buy, sell or hold assets.
